zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Yelverton of Rougham於大約1400年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親John Yelverton Esquire46歲，母親Elizabeth Read36歲。他於1421年之前與Joan Le Gross結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1470年被列為judge of the court of common pleas。他去世於1477年3月27日享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Yelverton of Rougham于大约1400年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，他的父亲John Yelverton Esquire46岁，母亲Elizabeth Read36岁。他于1421年之前与Joan Le Gross结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1470年被列为judge of the court of common pleas。他去世于1477年3月27日享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Yelverton of Rougham was born about 1400, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Yelverton Esquire, was 46 and his mother, Elizabeth Read, was 36. He married Joan Le Gross before 1421. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1470, at the age of 71, his occupation is listed as judge of the court of common pleas. He died on 27 March 1477, at the age of 78, and was buried in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Yelverton of Rougham est né environ 1400, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Yelverton Esquire, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Read, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Joan Le Gross avant 1421. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1470, à l’âge de 71 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est judge of the court of common pleas. Il est décédé le 27 mars 1477, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Yelverton of Rougham um 1400 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Yelverton Esquire 46 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Read 36. Er hat vor 1421 Joan Le Gross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1470, als er 71 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als judge of the court of common pleas aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. März 1477 im Alter von 78 Jahren und wurde in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Yelverton of Rougham è nato il circa 1400 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Yelverton Esquire, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Read, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Joan Le Gross prima del 1421. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1470, all'età di 71 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come judge of the court of common pleas. Morì il 27 marzo 1477, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Yelverton of Roughamが約1400年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父John Yelverton Esquireは46歳，母Elizabeth Readは36歳であった。1421年以前にJoan Le Grossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1470年，71歳の時，職業はjudge of the court of common pleasと記録されている。彼は1477年3月27日に78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Yelverton of Rougham(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Yelverton Esquire(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Read(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1421년 이전 Joan Le Gross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1470년, 71세의 나이로 그의 직업은 judge of the court of common pleas이었다. 그는 1477년 3월 27일 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Yelverton of Rougham nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Yelverton Esquire, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Read, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Le Gross antes 1421. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1470, com 71 anos, sua profissão aparece como judge of the court of common pleas. Ele faleceu em 27 de março de 1477, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England: Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Yelverton of Rougham родился около 1400 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Yelverton Esquire было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Read, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Le Gross перед 1421 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1470 году, в возрасте 71 год,  он работал по профессии judge of the court of common pleas. Он умер 27 марта 1477 г. в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
